name: James Whitmore
subject: Interested in Rolex Daytona
message: Hello, I saw the Rolex Daytona 116500LN listed and I'm very interested. Is it still available? I'd like to arrange a viewing at your Hatton Garden location.

name: Sarah Chen
subject: Gold bar purchase enquiry
message: I'm looking to purchase 5oz gold bars as part of a portfolio diversification. Could you provide current pricing and availability?
notes: Called back on 11 Apr. Sent pricing sheet. Awaiting response.

name: Robert Ashby
subject: Diamond ring for engagement
message: Looking for a diamond engagement ring, around 1.5-2ct, preferably D-F colour and VS or better. Budget circa £15,000. Do you have anything suitable?
notes: Sold him the 2.1ct ring (inv_004). Transaction completed 12 Apr.
